data.content: All 7 child knots have advanced past implementation. 6 children (knots-09f2, knots-2aa3, knots-2bc3, knots-93c9, knots-e071, knots-ed42) are in ready_for_shipment. 1 child (knots-28b1, tests) is in ready_for_implementation_review. Parent implementation is complete — all sub-tasks covering core schema, events, CLI, prompt rendering, foolery backend, foolery CLI serialization, and test coverage have been implemented.
